scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=@pediaquiz/types && npm run build --workspace=functions && npm run build --workspace=frontend
scripts.clean: rm -rf node_modules && find . -name 'node_modules' -type d -prune -exec rm -rf '{}' + && find . -name 'lib' -type d -prune -exec rm -rf '{}' + && find . -name 'dist' -type d -prune -exec rm -rf '{}' + && find . -name '*.tsbuildinfo' -type f -delete && npm cache clean --force
